input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4
            TITLE: electronic throttle control

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4: ELECTRONIC THROTTLE CONTROL
IC.4 ELECTRONIC THROTTLE CONTROL 
This section IC.4 applies only when Electronic Throttle Control is used 
An Electronic Throttle Control (ETC) system may be used.  This is a device or system which 
may change the engine throttle setting based on various inputs.

RULE: ic.4.6
            TITLE: brake system encoder - bse

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.6: Brake System Encoder - BSE
IC.4.6 Brake System Encoder - BSE 
Refer to T.4.3 for specific requirements of the BSE

RULE: ic.4.5
            TITLE: accelerator pedal position sensor - apps

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.5: Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor - APPS
IC.4.5 Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor - APPS 
Refer to T.4.2 for specific requirements of the APPS

final_answer: IC.4 ELECTRONIC THROTTLE CONTROL This section IC.4 applies only when Electronic Throttle Control is used An Electronic Throttle Control (ETC) system may be used. This is a device or system which may change the engine throttle setting based on various inputs.
